name: Lundin Energy AB
description: Lundin Energy AB was an independent oil and gas exploration and production company headquartered in Stockholm, Sweden, with a primary focus on operations in Norway. The company was known for its significant exploration success and production growth in the Norwegian Continental Shelf. Following the sale of its oil and gas business to Aker BP in 2022, the company rebranded as Orrön Energy AB and shifted its strategic focus toward investments in renewable energy projects across the Nordic region and Europe, leveraging its expertise to develop sustainable power assets.
